name: Supper Omelet with Chicken Sauce
recipeInstructions:
OMELET
1. Make the cream sauce by melting butter in a bowl, stirring in flour and salt, then gradually adding milk until smooth.
2. Add diced chicken, mushrooms, green pepper, pimento, olives, and chives to the sauce. Heat through but keep warm.
3. Beat eggs slightly, add milk and seasonings (salt, pepper). Melt butter in a non-stick skillet, pour in egg mixture and cook slowly.
4. Using a spatula, lift the edges of the omelet to allow any uncooked portions to flow underneath.
5. When the egg is nearly set but still glossy, loosen the edge, roll or fold one half over onto itself.
6. Slide the omelet onto a warm platter and pour the sauce over the top.
This recipe provides a clear, step-by-step guide for preparing an omelet with a chicken sauce using standard ingredients and measurements.
